title: Mojanimation Backport
description: A backport of vanilla's animation system to older versions
body:
Mojanimation Backport is a small animation library that's a backport of vanilla Minecraft's keyframe animation system that was added in 1.19 to older versions. It follows the exact same exporting format as well ("Export Modded Entity Animations" in Blockbench)

### **How to Use:**
**Players:** If another mod depends on this mod, just install this mod like any other

**Modders:** See the [GitHub Wiki](https://github.com/TheDarkPeasant/MojanimationBackport/wiki)
 
In the future I may or may not port this to more versions, I'm unsure. However, I am sure that I won't be porting this to other mod loaders. The source code is public [here](https://github.com/TheDarkPeasant/MojanimationBackport) though, so if anyone would like to make a port, feel free to make a pull request there.

Also I did kind of make this on a whim for no real reason, so if there are any bugs feel free to report them on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/TheDarkPeasant/MojanimationBackport/issues).
 
Credits:

Original code by Mojang (duh)

Framekey (thumbnail) drawn by Lol_34635


Vanilla animation system dubbed "Mojanimation" by Yellowbross Production (I love that name it's so goofy)
